_publications._publicationTitle: Capturing the wide variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with eight key factors: a computational study.

_contextSnippet: we used a well-established multiscale computational model of bone regeneration to integrate the state-of-the-art experimental knowledge on the effect of the Nf1 mutation on bone fracture healing
details: Successfully integrated state-of-the-art experimental knowledge on Nf1 mutation effects on bone fracture healing and predicted all distinctive characteristics of pseudarthrosis
